doc_type: pipeline-safety technical/compliance inspection report (LNG standard inspection)
source_note: Washington UTC Pipeline Safety Program technical/compliance inspection report #8807 — LNG Standard Inspection of Puget Sound Energy's Gig Harbor LNG satellite plant, protocol set LNG.2024.01 (approved Sept 10, 2024, 18 pp). UTC inspectors audit the operator's program against a published protocol set, recording scope, findings and satisfactory/unsatisfactory ratings ('No violations or concerns from this inspection'). These program inspections carry no docket number; the report id + protocol set is the stable key. Static .gov PDF on utc.wa.gov. Page 1 verified 2026-07-10. Listed for reference (metadata-only).
